---
title: "Writing"
subtitle: "Research, exposition, outreach and teaching ideas for readers at different levels."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-writing-latest
    contents: articles
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date, reading-time]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Writing from Math Nomad"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
This is the intellectual notebook of Math Nomad: polished exposition beside research notes, outreach ideas and reflections on teaching. Audience labels suggest a starting point without placing a fence around the mathematics.

[Follow new writing via RSS](index.xml){.mn-rss-link}
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## Latest writing

Newest pieces appear first. As the collection grows, filters will make it easier to browse by audience, form and mathematical topic.

::: {#mn-writing-latest}
:::
:::
